message:
test(fr-conformance): wire live oracle diff for bitmap + generic + transaction (br-frankenredis-nkdh, 532q, hh0k)

First-run parity vs vendored redis-server:
  - core_bitmap:      108/110 pass, 2 wording divergences (ugkf)
  - core_generic:     223/232 pass, 9 divergences (3cqd)
  - core_transaction: 192/192 pass ✓

Divergences filed as [HIGH] review beads:
  - ugkf (P2): BITCOUNT wrong-arity + BITFIELD OVERFLOW wording
  - 3cqd:      OBJECT REFCOUNT nil-vs-error + KEYS order + expiry

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
